title: Anwenk Harmonica Key of C 10 Hole 20 Tone Diatonic Harmonica C with Case for Beginner,Students, Kids Gift (Silver)
features: POPULAR KEY OF C- Key of C 10 hole 20 Tones diatonic harmonica suitable for Blues, Folk and Pop. Perfect size for beginners, kids gift.
POCKET SIZE- Small and sleek harmonica with smart size 4" x0.9"x0.8"(L X W X H). Easy to hold in one hand.
SMOOTH HOLE SURFACE-Precision-made plastic comb with chrome steel cover is smooth and easy to slide across on holes which help minimize moisture absorption.

CRISPY TONE- Made of copper reed plate with stainless steel cover plate, fully enclosed ends minimizes air leakage with surprisingly rich tone. Each harmonica is carefully tuned and tested during manufacturing to ensure best sound and quality.
Package contents: 1 x Harmonica, 1 x Case, 1x Instruction, 1 x Cleaning cloth.
description: Product Description Anwenk Harmonica for Beginners Ideal for Kids, and Students. This pocket size harmonica features 10 holes giving the player 20 tones and is designed to allow the player to play chords and melodies in a single key; This key C harmonica is perfect for solo playing or chorus; Suitable for Blues, Folk Pop and all styles of music. Note: Do not share your harmonica with others. DO NOT wash your harmonica with HOT water, alcohol, or other chemical reagent. In Key of C 10 Hole 20 Tones. Clear & Rich Sounds. Package includes: a Harmonica Key C 10 Hole, a pocket case to protect the harmonica, a cleaning cloth, an English instruction. Your Wise Choice Portable: 4" x0.9"x0.8"(L x W x H) Enjoy the Music Wherever You Want This harmonica is made of copper reed plate with stainless steel cover plate, making the sound stable and rich. Fully enclosed ends minimizes air leakage with surprisingly rich tone. It's a wise choice for kids and beginners /adult beginners who love harmonica and want to learn to know harmonica.
